prompt:
A vertical aspect ratio of 3:4. Use the uploaded character as the base reference. Draw it in the center.

Output five people.

Design new characters that appear in the same game as the base character.

⸻

[Most Important]
Strictly maintain the art style of the base character.
Maintain the world-building of the base character.
Maintain the color design of the base character.
Maintain the design philosophy of the base character.
Ensure they function as characters within the same work.
Do not make the image unnecessarily high-detail. Do not add fine effects or dust. Do not make the screen messy. Adding particles is taboo. Do not make the clothing design too detailed. Avoid excessive decoration.

⸻

[Prohibitions]
Do not reuse the base character's face.
Do not reuse the base character's hairstyle.
Do not reuse the base character's hair color.
Do not reuse the base character's eye shape.
Do not reuse the base character's bangs.
Do not reuse the base character's personality.
Do not create color-swapped characters.
Do not make them look like sisters.
Use clothing different from the base character. New design.
Change colors from the base character's clothing. New design.
Must be immediately recognizable as a different person.

⸻
